objective: Validate Architecture v1 runtime assumptions on Ubuntu and return a fact-checked architecture evidence bundle.
required_validation: Confirm site_kb_server health endpoint is reachable on 127.0.0.1:8091
Confirm /health status is ok and documents count is numeric
Confirm direct Chroma count for lariel_site_kb at site_kb_chromadb
Confirm verify_site_kb_consistency.sh exists and runs successfully
Confirm Ollama is reachable and active models listed
Report any architecture drift versus architecture/mide_architecture_v1.json
execution_instructions: Run required commands and capture outputs
git commit -m 'worker: add TASK-0007 architecture validation result'
commands_expected: cd ~/Documents/itheia-llm && python3 -c "import chromadb; c=chromadb.PersistentClient(path='site_kb_chromadb'); col=c.get_collection('lariel_site_kb'); print({'collection': col.name, 'count': col.count()})"
